calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-06-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Harold Jaffe for (administrator) Aine Dalton.

The Court asked counsel if he had additional argument regarding the Laffey Matrix. Mr. Jaffe stated that the Graham case is on point, that the assets languished for 13 years, that they came to the attention of the decedent's brother when he received the letter, that most of the work was done finding the assets, that the trust was never funded, regarding the extraordinary fees he stated that because this is not a large case the extraordinary fees are not consumed in the statutory fees and that it is now 4 years after the work was started. The accounting petition was taken under submission.

Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Robles. (Not Reported)

Off Calendar Sep-14-2015 Continued To Oct-19-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court stated that an Order to Appear was previously issued, there is no appearance today, an Order to Show Cause regarding surcharge/suspension or removal will be issued for October 19, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The status on filing a petition for final distribution and the Order to Appear were continued to that date also.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing A Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-17-2015 Continued To Sep-14-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the administrator Aine Dalton and the Attorney Harold Jaffe to appear on 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why the petition for final distribution has not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)

Off Calendar Apr-27-2015 Continued To May-18-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Preliminary Distribution
Off Calendar Dec-31-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Harold Jaffe for Aine Dalton.

Mr. Jaffe stated that he believes Mr. Jones who claimed to have a long term relationship with the decedent got the vanguard account, that he does not think Mr. Jones got the McKesson asset, that the attorney in Ireland representing the Brother does not want to pursue it because it's a minimal amount and that they are still trying to run down the assets. The Petition for Preliminary Distribution was taken under submission. Status on filing of a petition for final distribution or petition for approval of status report was set for April 27, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)
